edges.target:
function:src/openhuman/agent/harness/session/runtime.rs:parsed_calls
            .iter()
            .enumerate()
            .map(|(idx, call)| ToolCall {
                id: call
                    .tool_call_id
                    .clone()
                    .unwrap_or_else(|| format!("parsed-{}-{}", iteration + 1, idx + 1)),
                name: call.name.clone(),
                arguments: call.arguments.to_string(),
                // Prompt-based tool calls carry no provider extra_content.
                extra_content: None,
            }).collect

function:src/openhuman/agent/harness/session/transcript.rs:entries
        .flatten()
        .map(|entry| entry.path())
        .filter(|path| {
            path.extension().and_then(|s| s.to_str()) == Some("jsonl")
                && path
                    .file_stem()
                    .and_then(|s| s.to_str())
                    .is_some_and(|stem| !stem.contains("__"))
        }).filter
